creator: tcberner@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 212404
v2

Moin moin 

The new patch attached, which can also be found here: 
  https://people.freebsd.org/~tcberner/patches/qca-2.3.0.v2.diff , 
adds a new port devel/qca-legay and a USES=qca, which should be used from now on to depend on a qca port. It switches betweeen devel/qca and devel/qca-legacy depending on OS version.


mfg Toibas
